body:
Aaron,

Attaching the Toast POS monthly export for Alt 19, August 2026. Net sales for the month came in at $78,450.00 across dining room and patio bar, and that figure includes the final settlement batch of $6,120.00 that closed on 2026-09-01 after the month books were already cut. Let me know if you want the by-daypart breakdown.

- Maria
snippet: Attaching the Toast POS monthly export for Alt 19, August 2026. Net sales for the month came in at $78,450.00...
subject: Alt 19 Toast POS export - August 2026

body:
Aaron,

For the Q4 estimate work, here is what we actually filed for tax year 2025 by entity so you can run the safe harbor against it: personal joint total tax $41,800.00, Mykonos Taverna LLC $18,600.00, Mykonos Taverna II LLC $15,900.00, and rental income $6,400.00. These are the final filed 2025 numbers, not estimates.

- Eleni
snippet: For the Q4 estimate work, here is what we actually filed for tax year 2025 by entity...
subject: 2025 filed tax by entity - for the Q4 safe harbor

body:
Aaron,

Gusto year-end payroll-of-record report for 2026 is ready. Flagging George Hatzis since you asked: his 2026 YTD gross wages of record are $56,500.00, which is his $55,000.00 base plus the $1,500.00 St. Nicholas holiday bonus paid in the final December run. This payroll-of-record figure is the one for the W-2 and the tax work, not the standing comp record.

- Eleni
snippet: Gusto year-end payroll-of-record report for 2026 is ready. George Hatzis 2026 YTD gross wages of record are $56,500.00...
subject: Gusto 2026 payroll of record - year-end YTD (Hatzis)
